t_id.iwq: Ataukah kamu meminta upah kepada mereka sehingga mereka dibebani dengan hutang?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أم تسألهم أجرا» على ما جئتهم به من الدين «فهم من مغرم» غرم ذلك «مثقلون» فلا يسلمون
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَمۡ تَسۡـَٔلُهُمۡ أَجۡرٗا فَهُم مِّن مَّغۡرَمٖ مُّثۡقَلُونَ (مِّن مَّغْرَمٍ: مِنِ الْتِزَامِ غَرَامَةٍ تَطْلُبُهَا مِنْهُمْ, مُّثْقَلُونَ: مُتْعَبُونَ، مُجْهَدُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ataukah kalian meminta upah kepada mereka) atas jerih payahmu di dalam menyampaikan agama yang kamu datangkan itu (sehingga mereka oleh utang mereka) oleh tanggungan dalam hal itu (dibebani) karena itu mereka tidak dapat mengembalikannya

ar: أَمۡ عِندَهُمُ ٱلۡغَیۡبُ فَهُمۡ یَكۡتُبُونَ
ar_simple: أم عندهم ٱلغیب فهم یكتبون

t.sahih-int: Or have they [knowledge of] the unseen, so they write [it] down
t.asad: Or [do they think] that the hidden reality [of all that exists] is almost within their grasp, so that [in time] they can write it down
t.yusuf-ali: Or that the Unseen in it their hands, and they write it down
t.pickthall: Or possess they the Unseen so that they can write (it) down
t.arberry: Or is the Unseen in their keeping, and so they are writing it down
t.hilali-khan: Or that the Ghaib (unseen) is with them, and they write it down
t.itani: Or do they know the future, and they are writing it down?
t.mubarakpuri: Or that the Unseen is with them, and they write it down
t.qarib: Or if they know the future, so they write [it] down
t.wahiduddin: Do they possess knowledge of the unseen, so that they can write it down
t.shakir: Or have they the unseen so that they write (it) down
t.haleem: Do they have [access to] the unseen? Could they write it down
t.maariful: Or have they the knowledge of the Unseen, and they are recording it
t.khattab: Or do they have access to ˹the Record in˺ the unseen, so they copy it ˹for all to see˺
t.ghali: Or even do they have in their presence the Unseen, (and) so they are writing (it) down
t.irving: Do they have the Unseen which they are writing down
t.iwq: Or have they knowledge of the unseen, so they write it down

t_id.kemenag: Apakah ada pada sisi mereka pengetahuan tentang yang gaib lalu mereka menuliskannya?
t_id.sabiq: Ataukah mereka mempunyai pengetahuan tentang yang gaib, sehingga mereka dapat menuliskannya sebagaimana yang mereka kehendaki?
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Apakah ada pada sisi mereka pengetahuan tentang yang gaib) mengetahui hal yang gaib (lalu mereka menuliskannya?) sehingga mereka mampu untuk menentang Nabi saw dalam masalah hari berbangkit dan perkara-perkara akhirat sesuai dengan dugaan mereka.
t_id.iwq: Apakah ada pada sisi mereka pengetahuan tentang yang gaib lalu mereka menuliskannya?

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أم عندهم الغيب» أي علمه «فهم يكتبون» ذلك حتى يمكنهم منازعة النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم في البعث وأمور الآخرة بزعمهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَمۡ عِندَهُمُ ٱلۡغَيۡبُ فَهُمۡ يَكۡتُبُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Apakah ada pada sisi mereka pengetahuan tentang yang gaib) mengetahui hal yang gaib (lalu mereka menuliskannya?) sehingga mereka mampu untuk menentang Nabi saw dalam masalah hari berbangkit dan perkara-perkara akhirat sesuai dengan dugaan mereka

ar: أَمۡ یُرِیدُونَ كَیۡدࣰاۖ فَٱلَّذِینَ كَفَرُوا۟ هُمُ ٱلۡمَكِیدُونَ
ar_simple: أم یریدون كیدا فٱلذین كفروا هم ٱلمكیدون

t.sahih-int: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan
t.asad: Or do they want to entrap [thee in contradictions]? But they who are bent on denying the truth - it is they who are truly entrapped
t.yusuf-ali: Or do they intend a plot (against thee)? But those who defy Allah are themselves involved in a Plot
t.pickthall: Or seek they to ensnare (the messenger)? But those who disbelieve, they are the ensnared
t.arberry: Or desire they to outwit? The unbelievers, they are the outwitted
t.hilali-khan: Or do they intend a plot (against you O Muhammad SAW)? But those who disbelieve (in the Oneness of Allah Islamic Monotheism) are themselves in a plot
t.itani: Or are they planning a conspiracy? The conspiracy will befall the disbelievers.
t.mubarakpuri: Or do they intend a plot But those who disbelieve are themselves plotted against!
t.qarib: Or are they plotting against you? The plot will fall back on the unbelievers
t.wahiduddin: Do they want to hatch some plot? Those who deny the truth will be the victims of the plot
t.shakir: Or do they desire a war? But those who disbelieve shall be the vanquished ones in war
t.haleem: Do they think they can ensnare you? It is the disbelievers who have been ensnared
t.maariful: Or do they intend to plan to do harm (to the prophet)? Then the disbelievers themselves shall be harmed by the plan
t.khattab: Or do they intend to scheme ˹against the Prophet˺? Then it is the disbelievers who will fall victim to ˹their˺ schemes
t.ghali: Or even would they like plotting? Then the ones who have disbelieved are they who are (circumvented) in their plotting
t.irving: Or do they want [to hatch] some plot, while those who disbelieve are themselves being plotted against
t.iwq: Or do they intend a plan? But those who disbelieve - they are the object of a plan

t_id.kemenag: Ataukah mereka hendak melakukan tipu daya? Maka orang-orang yang kafir itu merekalah yang kena tipu daya.
t_id.sabiq: Ataukah mereka ingin melakukan tipu daya dan menyalahkan pesan-pesan sucimu? Maka sesungguhnya orang-orang kafir itulah yang akan tertimpa tipu daya.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ataukah mereka hendak melakukan tipu daya?) terhadap dirimu dengan maksud untuk membinasakan dirimu, sewaktu mereka berkumpul di Darunnadwah. (Maka orang-orang yang kafir itu merekalah yang kena tipu daya) maksudnya, merekalah yang kalah dan binasa. Allah memelihara nabi dari ulah mereka, kemudian Dia membinasakan mereka dalam perang Badar.
t_id.iwq: Ataukah mereka hendak melakukan tipu daya? Maka orang-orang yang kafir itu merekalah yang kena tipu daya.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أم يريدون كيدا» بك ليهلكوك في دار الندوة «فالذين كفروا هم المكيدون» المغلوبون المهلكون فحفظه الله منهم ثم أهلكهم ببدر
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَمۡ يُرِيدُونَ كَيۡدٗاۖ فَٱلَّذِينَ كَفَرُواْ هُمُ ٱلۡمَكِيدُونَ (كَيْدًا: مَكْرًا, الْمَكِيدُونَ: يَرْجِعُ مَكْرُهُمْ عَلَى أَنْفُسِهِمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ataukah mereka hendak melakukan tipu daya?) terhadap dirimu dengan maksud untuk membinasakan dirimu, sewaktu mereka berkumpul di Darunnadwah. (Maka orang-orang yang kafir itu merekalah yang kena tipu daya) maksudnya, merekalah yang kalah dan binasa. Allah memelihara nabi dari ulah mereka, kemudian Dia membinasakan mereka dalam perang Badar

ar: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ إِلَـٰهٌ غَیۡرُ ٱللَّهِۚ سُبۡحَـٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا یُشۡرِكُونَ
ar_simple: أم لهم إله غیر ٱلله سبحن ٱلله عما یشركون

t.sahih-int: Or have they a deity other than Allah? Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him
t.asad: Have they, then, any deity other than God? Utterly remote is God, in His limitless glory, from anything to which men may ascribe a share in His divinity
t.yusuf-ali: Or have they a god other than Allah? Exalted is Allah far above the things they associate with Him
t.pickthall: Or have they any god beside Allah? Glorified be Allah from all that they ascribe as partner (unto Him)
t.arberry: Or have they a god, other than God? Glory be to God, above that which they associate
t.hilali-khan: Or have they an ilah (a god) other than Allah? Glorified be Allah from all that they ascribe as partners (to Him)
t.itani: Or do they have a god besides God? God transcends what they associate.
t.mubarakpuri: Or have they a god other than Allah Glorified be Allah from all that they ascribe as partners.
t.qarib: Or do they have a god other than God? May He be exalted in His glory. God is far above anything they associate with Him
t.wahiduddin: Or have they a god other than God? Exalted be God over what they ascribe as partners [to Him]
t.shakir: Or have they a god other than Allah? Glory be to Allah from what they set up (with Him)
t.haleem: Do they really have another god besides God? God is far above anything they set alongside Him
t.maariful: Or do they have a god other than Allah? Pure is Allah from what they associate with Him
t.khattab: Or do they have a god other than Allah? Glorified is Allah far above what they associate ˹with Him˺
t.ghali: Or even do they have a god, other than Allah? All Extolment be to Allah above whatever they associate (with Him)
t.irving: Or do they have some other deity instead of God [Alone]? Glory be to God ahead of anything they may associate [with Him]
t.iwq: Or have they a deity other than Allah? Exalted is Allah above whatever they associate with Him

t_id.kemenag: Ataukah mereka mempunyai tuhan selain Allah. Maha Suci Allah dari apa yang mereka persekutukan.
t_id.sabiq: Ataukah mereka memiliki sesembahan selain Allah yang dapat menahan mereka dari azab Allah. Mahasuci Allah dari segala yang mereka sekutukan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Ataukah mereka mempunyai tuhan selain Allah. Maha Suci Allah dari apa yang mereka persekutukan") yakni berhala-berhala yang mereka persekutukan dengan-Nya. Kata tanya dengan memakai lafal Am pada ayat ini dan ayat-ayat sebelumnya mengandung makna memburuk-burukkan dan mencela perbuatan mereka.
t_id.iwq: Ataukah mereka mempunyai tuhan selain Allah. Maha Suci Allah dari apa yang mereka persekutukan.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «أم لهم إله غير الله سبحان الله عما يشركون» به من الآلهة والاستفهام بأم في مواضعها للتقبيح والتوبيخ
tafsir.siraj-ar: أَمۡ لَهُمۡ إِلَٰهٌ غَيۡرُ ٱللَّهِۚ سُبۡحَٰنَ ٱللَّهِ عَمَّا يُشۡرِكُونَ
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Ataukah mereka mempunyai tuhan selain Allah. Maha Suci Allah dari apa yang mereka persekutukan") yakni berhala-berhala yang mereka persekutukan dengan-Nya. Kata tanya dengan memakai lafal Am pada ayat ini dan ayat-ayat sebelumnya mengandung makna memburuk-burukkan dan mencela perbuatan mereka

ar: وَإِن یَرَوۡا۟ كِسۡفࣰا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَاۤءِ سَاقِطࣰا یَقُولُوا۟ سَحَابࣱ مَّرۡكُومࣱ
ar_simple: وإن یروا كسفا من ٱلسماء ساقطا یقولوا سحاب مركوم

t.sahih-int: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "[It is merely] clouds heaped up
t.asad: AND YET, if they [who refuse to see the truth] were to see part of the sky falling down, they would [only] say, “[It is but] a mass of clouds!”
t.yusuf-ali: Were they to see a piece of the sky falling (on them), they would (only) say: "Clouds gathered in heaps
t.pickthall: And if they were to see a fragment of the heaven falling, they would say: A heap of clouds
t.arberry: Even if they saw lumps falling from heaven, they would say, 'A massed cloud
t.hilali-khan: And if they were to see a piece of the heaven falling down, they would say: "Clouds gathered in heaps
t.itani: Even if they were to see lumps of the sky falling down, they would say, “A mass of clouds.”
t.mubarakpuri: And if they were to see a piece of the heaven falling down, they would say: "Clouds gathered in heaps!"
t.qarib: Even if they were to see a piece the sky falling, they would say, "Just a heap of clouds
t.wahiduddin: If they should see a part of the heavens falling down, they would say, "A mass of clouds
t.shakir: And if they should see a portion of the heaven coming down, they would say: Piled up clouds
t.haleem: Even if they saw a piece of heaven falling down on them, they would say, ‘Just a heap of clouds,’
t.maariful: Even if they see a piece falling down from the sky, they would say, “It is a cumulated cloud.”
t.khattab: If they were to see a ˹deadly˺ piece of the sky fall down ˹upon them˺, still they would say, “˹This is just˺ a pile of clouds.”
t.ghali: And in case they saw a dark lump falling down from the heaven, they would say, "Accumulated clouds
t.irving: If they ever saw some object falling out of the sky, they would say: ´Some clouds have been piled up
t.iwq: And if they were to see a fragment from the sky falling, they would say, "It is merely clouds heaped up

t_id.kemenag: Jika mereka melihat sebagian dari langit gugur, mereka akan mengatakan: "Itu adalah awan yang bertindih-tindih".
t_id.sabiq: Dan apabila mereka menyaksikan sebagian langit jatuh untuk menyiksa mereka, mereka akan berkata dengan sikap membangkang, "Itu adalah awan yang bergumpal-gumpal."
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Jika mereka melihat sebagian) bagian (dari langit yang gugur) menimpa mereka, sebagaimana yang mereka minta, yaitu seperti yang dijelaskan oleh ayat lain melalui firman-Nya, "Maka jatuhkanlah atas kami gumpalan dari langit." (Q.S. Asy Syu'ara, 187) sebagai azab atas mereka (mereka akan mengatakan,) "Ini (adalah awan yang bertindih-tindih) awan yang tebal yang akan menyegarkan kami dan mereka tidak mau beriman."
t_id.iwq: Jika mereka melihat sebagian dari langit gugur, mereka akan mengatakan: "Itu adalah awan yang bertindih-tindih".

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: (وإن يروا كسفا) بعضا (من السماء ساقطا) عليهم كما قالوا: "" فأسقط علينا كسفا من السماء "" أي تعذيبا لهم (يقولوا) هذا (سحاب مركوم) متراكب نروى به ولا يؤمنون
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِن يَرَوۡاْ كِسۡفٗا مِّنَ ٱلسَّمَآءِ سَاقِطٗا يَقُولُواْ سَحَابٞ مَّرۡكُومٞ (كِسْفًا: قِطَعًا, مَّرْكُومٌ: مُتَرَاكِمٌ بَعْضُهُ فَوْقَ بَعْضٍ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Jika mereka melihat sebagian) bagian (dari langit yang gugur) menimpa mereka, sebagaimana yang mereka minta, yaitu seperti yang dijelaskan oleh ayat lain melalui firman-Nya, "Maka jatuhkanlah atas kami gumpalan dari langit." (Q.S. Asy Syu'ara, 187) sebagai azab atas mereka (mereka akan mengatakan,) "Ini (adalah awan yang bertindih-tindih) awan yang tebal yang akan menyegarkan kami dan mereka tidak mau beriman

ar: فَذَرۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ یُلَـٰقُوا۟ یَوۡمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِی فِیهِ یُصۡعَقُونَ
ar_simple: فذرهم حتى یلقوا یومهم ٱلذی فیه یصعقون

t.sahih-int: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible
t.asad: Hence, leave them alone until they face that [Judgment] Day of theirs, when they will be stricken with terror
t.yusuf-ali: So leave them alone until they encounter that Day of theirs, wherein they shall (perforce) swoon (with terror)
t.pickthall: Then let them be (O Muhammad), till they meet their day, in which they will be thunder-stricken
t.arberry: Then leave them, till they encounter their day wherein they shall be thunderstruck
t.hilali-khan: So leave them alone till they meet their Day, in which they will sink into a fainting (with horror)
t.itani: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be stunned.
t.mubarakpuri: So leave them alone till they meet their Day, in which they will sink into a fainting (with horror).
t.qarib: So leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be stunned
t.wahiduddin: so leave them alone till they face the Day on which they will be struck dumb
t.shakir: Leave them then till they meet that day of theirs wherein they shall be made to swoon (with terror)
t.haleem: so leave them, Prophet, until they face the Day when they will be thunderstruck
t.maariful: So, leave them alone until they face their Day, in which they will be turned unconscious
t.khattab: So leave them until they face their Day in which they will be struck dead—
t.ghali: So, leave them out, till they meet their Day wherein they will be stunned. (i.e., thunderstruck)
t.irving: Leave them alone till they encounter their day in which they will be stunned
t.iwq: Thus leave them until they meet their Day in which they will be struck insensible

t_id.kemenag: Maka biarkanlah mereka hingga mereka menemui hari (yang dijanjikan kepada) mereka yang pada hari itu mereka dibinasakan,
t_id.sabiq: Maka biarkan dan jangan pedulikan mereka sampai mereka menemui hari ketika mereka dibinasakan.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Maka biarkanlah mereka hingga mereka menemui hari mereka yang pada hari itu mereka dibinasakan) yaitu mati semuanya.
t_id.iwq: Maka biarkanlah mereka hingga mereka menemui hari (yang dijanjikan kepada) mereka yang pada hari itu mereka dibinasakan,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «فذرهم حتى يلاقوا يومهم الذي فيه يصعقون» يموتون
tafsir.siraj-ar: فَذَرۡهُمۡ حَتَّىٰ يُلَٰقُواْ يَوۡمَهُمُ ٱلَّذِي فِيهِ يُصۡعَقُونَ (يُصْعَقُونَ: يُهْلَكُونَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Maka biarkanlah mereka hingga mereka menemui hari mereka yang pada hari itu mereka dibinasakan) yaitu mati semuanya

ar: یَوۡمَ لَا یُغۡنِی عَنۡهُمۡ كَیۡدُهُمۡ شَیۡءࣰا وَلَا هُمۡ یُنصَرُونَ
ar_simple: یوم لا یغنی عنهم كیدهم شیءا ولا هم ینصرون

t.sahih-int: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped
t.asad: the Day when none of their scheming will be of the least avail to them, and they will receive no succour
t.yusuf-ali: The Day when their plotting will avail them nothing and no help shall be given them
t.pickthall: A day in which their guile will naught avail them, nor will they be helped
t.arberry: the day when their guile shall avail them naught, and they shall not be helped
t.hilali-khan: The Day when their plotting shall not avail them at all nor will they be helped (i.e. they will receive their torment in Hell)
t.itani: The Day when their ploys will avail them nothing; and they will not be helped.
t.mubarakpuri: The Day when their plotting shall not avail them at all, nor will they be helped.
t.qarib: the Day when their plotting will not do them any good, nor will they be helped
t.wahiduddin: the Day when none of their scheming will be of the least avail to them, and they will receive no succour
t.shakir: The day on which their struggle shall not avail them aught, nor shall they be helped
t.haleem: the Day when their snares will be of no use to them, when they will get no help
t.maariful: the Day their planning will not benefit them in the least, nor will they be helped
t.khattab: the Day their scheming will be of no benefit to them whatsoever, nor will they be helped
t.ghali: The Day when their plotting will not avail them anything, nor will they be vindicated
t.irving: a day when their plotting will not help them out at all nor will they be supported
t.iwq: The Day their plan will not avail them at all, nor will they be helped

t_id.kemenag: (yaitu) hari ketika tidak berguna bagi mereka sedikitpun tipu daya mereka dan mereka tidak ditolong.
t_id.sabiq: Yaitu hari ketika tipu daya mereka tidak dapat menahan mereka dari azab, dan mereka tidak pula mendapatkan penolong.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu hari ketika tidak berguna) menjadi Badal dari lafal Yaumahum (bagi mereka sedikit pun tipu daya mereka dan mereka tidak ditolong) tidak diselamatkan dari azab di akhirat.
t_id.iwq: (yaitu) hari ketika tidak berguna bagi mereka sedikitpun tipu daya mereka dan mereka tidak ditolong.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «يوم لا يغني» بدل من يومهم «عنهم كيدهم شيئا ولا هم يُنصرون» يمنعون من العذاب في الآخرة
tafsir.siraj-ar: يَوۡمَ لَا يُغۡنِي عَنۡهُمۡ كَيۡدُهُمۡ شَيۡـٔٗا وَلَا هُمۡ يُنصَرُونَ (لَا يُغْنِي عَنْهُمْ: لَا يَدْفَعُ عَنْهُمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Yaitu hari ketika tidak berguna) menjadi Badal dari lafal Yaumahum (bagi mereka sedikit pun tipu daya mereka dan mereka tidak ditolong) tidak diselamatkan dari azab di akhirat

ar: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِینَ ظَلَمُوا۟ عَذَابࣰا دُونَ ذَ ٰلِكَ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا یَعۡلَمُونَ
ar_simple: وإن للذین ظلموا عذابا دون ذ لك ولكن أكثرهم لا یعلمون

t.sahih-int: And indeed, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know
t.asad: But, verily, for those who are bent on doing evil, there is suffering in store [even] closer at hand than that [supreme suffering in the hereafter]: but most of them are not aware of it
t.yusuf-ali: And verily, for those who do wrong, there is another punishment besides this: But most of them understand not
t.pickthall: And verily, for those who do wrong, there is a punishment beyond that. But most of them know not
t.arberry: And there surely awaits the evildoers a chastisement beyond even that, but most of them know it not
t.hilali-khan: And verily, for those who do wrong, there is another punishment (i.e. the torment in this world and in their graves) before this, but most of them know not. [Tafsir At-Tabari, Vol. 27, Page]
t.itani: For those who do wrong, there is a punishment besides that; but most of them do not know.
t.mubarakpuri: And verily, for those who do wrong, there is another punishment before this; but most of them know not.
t.qarib: Another punishment awaits the unjust, but most of them are unaware of it
t.wahiduddin: Truly, for those who do wrong there is a punishment besides that, though most of them do not know it
t.shakir: And surely those who are unjust shall have a punishment besides that (in the world), but most of them do not know
t.haleem: Another punishment awaits the evildoers, though most of them do not realize it
t.maariful: And for those who did wrong there is another punishment before that, but most of them do not know
t.khattab: Also, the wrongdoers will certainly have another torment before that ˹Day˺, but most of them do not know
t.ghali: And surely, for the ones who did injustice, there is a torment besides that, but most of them do not know
t.irving: The ones who act unjustly will have torment beyond that, even though most of them do not realize it
t.iwq: And verily, for those who have wronged is a punishment before that, but most of them do not know

t_id.kemenag: Dan sesungguhnya untuk orang-orang yang zalim ada azab selain daripada itu. Tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak mengetahui.
t_id.sabiq: Sesungguhnya orang-orang yang zalim itu akan mendapatkan azab, selain azab yang membinasakan mereka di dunia, tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak mengetahui hal ini.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya untuk orang-orang yang lalim) disebabkan kekafiran mereka (ada azab selain daripada itu) di dunia, sebelum kematian mereka; maka mereka disiksa oleh kelaparan dan kekeringan selama tujuh tahun, serta oleh pembunuhan dalam perang Badar. (Tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak mengetahui) bahwasanya azab itu akan menimpa mereka.
t_id.iwq: Dan sesungguhnya untuk orang-orang yang zalim ada azab selain daripada itu. Tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak mengetahui.

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «وإنَّ للذين ظلموا» بكفرهم «عذابا دون ذلك» في الدنيا قبل موتهم فعذبوا بالجوع والقحط سبع سنين وبالقتل يوم بدر «ولكن أكثرهم لا يعلمون» أن العذاب ينزل بهم
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَإِنَّ لِلَّذِينَ ظَلَمُواْ عَذَابٗا دُونَ ذَٰلِكَ وَلَٰكِنَّ أَكۡثَرَهُمۡ لَا يَعۡلَمُونَ (دُونَ ذَلِكَ: قَبْلَ ذَلِكَ يَقَعُ فِي الدُّنْيَا عَلَيْهِمْ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan sesungguhnya untuk orang-orang yang lalim) disebabkan kekafiran mereka (ada azab selain daripada itu) di dunia, sebelum kematian mereka; maka mereka disiksa oleh kelaparan dan kekeringan selama tujuh tahun, serta oleh pembunuhan dalam perang Badar. (Tetapi kebanyakan mereka tidak mengetahui) bahwasanya azab itu akan menimpa mereka

ar: وَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعۡیُنِنَاۖ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ حِینَ تَقُومُ
ar_simple: وٱصبر لحكم ربك فإنك بأعیننا وسبح بحمد ربك حین تقوم

t.sahih-int: And be patient, [O Muhammad], for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes. And exalt [Allah] with praise of your Lord when you arise
t.asad: And so, await in patience thy Sustainer’s judgment, for thou art well within Our sight. And extol thy Sustainer’s limitless glory and praise whenever thou risest up
t.yusuf-ali: Now await in patience the command of thy Lord: for verily thou art in Our eyes: and celebrate the praises of thy Lord the while thou standest forth
t.pickthall: So wait patiently (O Muhammad) for thy Lord's decree, for surely thou art in Our sight; and hymn the praise of thy Lord when thou uprisest
t.arberry: And be thou patient under the judgment of thy Lord; surely thou art before Our eyes. And proclaim the praise of thy Lord when thou arisest
t.hilali-khan: So wait patiently (O Muhammad SAW) for the Decision of your Lord, for verily, you are under Our Eyes, and glorify the Praises of your Lord when you get up from sleep
t.itani: So patiently await the decision of your Lord, for you are before Our Eyes; and proclaim the praises of your Lord when you arise.
t.mubarakpuri: So wait patiently for the decision of your Lord, for verily, you are under Our Eyes; and glorify the praises of your Lord when you get up.
t.qarib: So wait patiently for your Lord's judgment, for you are before Our eyes. And praise your Lord of limitless glory when you arise
t.wahiduddin: So wait patiently for the Judgement of your Lord -- you are certainly under Our watchful eye. And glorify and celebrate the praises of your Lord when you rise up [from your sleep]
t.shakir: And wait patiently for the judgment of your Lord, for surely you are before Our eyes, and sing the praise of your Lord when you rise
t.haleem: Wait patiently [Prophet] for your Lord’s judgement: you are under Our watchful eye. Celebrate the praise of your Lord when you rise
t.maariful: And (O Prophet) be patient about the decision of your Lord, because you are in front of Our Eyes. And proclaim the purity of your Lord along with His praise when you stand (in Prayer)
t.khattab: So be patient with your Lord’s decree, for you are truly under Our ˹watchful˺ Eyes. And glorify the praises of your Lord when you rise
t.ghali: And (endure) patiently under the Judgment of your Lord, (for) then surely you are under Our Eyes, and extol with the praise (s) of your Lord when you rise up
t.irving: Act patiently towards your Lord´s discretion since you are under Our eyes. Hymn your Lord´s praise whenever you arise
t.iwq: And be patient, O Muhammad, for the decision of your Lord, for indeed, you are in Our eyes. And exalt Allah with praise of your Lord when you arise

t_id.kemenag: Dan bersabarlah dalam menunggu ketetapan Tuhanmu, maka sesungguhnya kamu berada dalam penglihatan Kami, dan bertasbihlah dengan memuji Tuhanmu ketika kamu bangun berdiri,
t_id.sabiq: Maka bersabarlah dengan ketetapan Tuhanmu yang menunda siksa bagi mereka, dan tabahlah dalam menghadapi penderitaan yang kamu terima dari mereka. Sesungguhnya kamu berada dalam penjagaan dan pemeliharaan Kami. Maka tipu daya mereka tidak akan membahayakanmu, dan bertasbihlah dengan memuji nama Tuhanmu ketika kamu bangun.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan bersabarlah dalam menunggu ketetapan Rabbmu) yaitu dengan ditangguhkannya mereka dan janganlah dadamu merasa sempit karenanya (maka sesungguhnya kamu berada dalam pengawasan-Ku) yaitu selalu dalam lindungan dan pengawasan-Ku (dan bertasbihlah) seraya (memuji Rabbmu) yaitu katakanlah, 'Subhaanallah Wa Bihamdihii' (ketika kamu bangun berdiri) dari tidurmu atau dari tempat majelismu.
t_id.iwq: Dan bersabarlah dalam menunggu ketetapan Tuhanmu, maka sesungguhnya kamu berada dalam penglihatan Kami, dan bertasbihlah dengan memuji Tuhanmu ketika kamu bangun berdiri,

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «واصبر لحكم ربك» بإمهالهم ولا يضق صدرك «فإنك بأعيننا» بمرأى منا نراك ونحفظك «وسبح» متلبسا «بحمد ربك» أي قل: سبحان الله وبحمده «حين تقوم» من منامك أو من مجلسك
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَٱصۡبِرۡ لِحُكۡمِ رَبِّكَ فَإِنَّكَ بِأَعۡيُنِنَاۖ وَسَبِّحۡ بِحَمۡدِ رَبِّكَ حِينَ تَقُومُ (بِأَعْيُنِنَا: بِمَرْأًى مِنَّا، وَحِفْظٍ، وَاعْتِنَاءٍ؛ وَفِيهِ: إِثْبَاتُ صِفَةِ العَيْنَيْنِ للهِ؛ كَمَا يَلِيقُ بِهِ؛ بِلَا تَكْيِيفٍ، وَلَا تَمْثِيلٍ، وَجَاءَتْ بِصِيغَةِ الجَمْعِ لِلتَّعْظِيمِ, وَسَبِّحْ بِحَمْدِ رَبِّكَ: نَزِّه رَبَّكَ، حَامِدًا لَهُ, حِينَ تَقُومُ: لِلصَّلَاةِ، وَمِنْ نَوْمِكَ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan bersabarlah dalam menunggu ketetapan Rabbmu) yaitu dengan ditangguhkannya mereka dan janganlah dadamu merasa sempit karenanya (maka sesungguhnya kamu berada dalam pengawasan-Ku) yaitu selalu dalam lindungan dan pengawasan-Ku (dan bertasbihlah) seraya (memuji Rabbmu) yaitu katakanlah, 'Subhaanallah Wa Bihamdihii' (ketika kamu bangun berdiri) dari tidurmu atau dari tempat majelismu

ar: وَمِنَ ٱلَّیۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَإِدۡبَـٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ
ar_simple: ومن ٱلیل فسبحه وإدبر ٱلنجوم

t.sahih-int: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after [the setting of] the stars
t.asad: and extol His glory at night, and at the time when the stars retreat
t.yusuf-ali: And for part of the night also praise thou Him,- and at the retreat of the stars
t.pickthall: And in the night-time also hymn His praise, and at the setting of the stars
t.arberry: and proclaim the praise of thy Lord in the night, and at the declining of the stars
t.hilali-khan: And in the night time, also glorify His Praises, and at the setting of the stars
t.itani: And glorify Him during the night, and at the receding of the stars.
t.mubarakpuri: And in the nighttime also glorify His praises and at the setting of the stars.
t.qarib: And glorify Him at night, and at the time when the stars retreat
t.wahiduddin: Extol His glory at night, and at the setting of the stars
t.shakir: And in the night, give Him glory too, and at the setting of the stars
t.haleem: Glorify Him at night and at the fading of the stars
t.maariful: And, in parts of night too, proclaim His purity, and at the time of setting of the stars
t.khattab: And glorify Him during part of the night and at the fading of the stars
t.ghali: And for (part) of the night, then (also) extol Him, and at the with drawing of the stars
t.irving: and at night glorify Him occasionally, and as the stars fade away
t.iwq: And in a part of the night exalt Him and after the setting of the stars

t_id.kemenag: dan bertasbihlah kepada-Nya pada beberapa saat di malam hari dan di waktu terbenam bintang-bintang (di waktu fajar).
t_id.sabiq: Pilihlah satu waktu dari malam dan sucikanlah Dia pada saat itu. Sucikanlah Dia pada saat bintang- bintang telah terbenam.
t_id.jalalayn-id: (Dan pada beberapa saat di malam hari bertasbih pulalah) pengertian bertasbih di sini adalah tasbih hakiki yaitu membaca, 'Subhaanallaah Wa bihamdihii' (dan di waktu terbenam bintang-bintang) lafal Idbaar adalah bentuk Mashdar, yakni setelah bintang-bintang itu terbenam maka bertasbih pulalah kamu. Atau lakukanlah salat Isya'ain yaitu Magrib dan Isya, pada pengertian yang pertama, dan pada pengertian yang kedua adalah salat fajar; menurut pendapat lain salat Subuh.
t_id.iwq: dan bertasbihlah kepada-Nya pada beberapa saat di malam hari dan di waktu terbenam bintang-bintang (di waktu fajar).

tafsir.jalalayn-ar: «ومن الليل فسبحه» حقيقة أيضا «وإدبار النجوم» مصدر، أي عقب غروبها سبحه أيضا، أو صلّ في الأول العشاءين، وفي الثاني الفجر وقيل الصبح
tafsir.siraj-ar: وَمِنَ ٱلَّيۡلِ فَسَبِّحۡهُ وَإِدۡبَٰرَ ٱلنُّجُومِ (فَسَبِّحْهُ: نَزِّهْهُ، وَعَظِّمْهُ، وَصَلِّ لَهُ, وَإِدْبَارَ النُّجُومِ: نَزِّهْهُ، وَصَلِّ لَهُ صَلَاةَ الصُّبْحِ وَقْتَ غَيْبَةِ النُّجُومِ)
tafsir.jalalayn-id: (Dan pada beberapa saat di malam hari bertasbih pulalah) pengertian bertasbih di sini adalah tasbih hakiki yaitu membaca, 'Subhaanallaah Wa bihamdihii' (dan di waktu terbenam bintang-bintang) lafal Idbaar adalah bentuk Mashdar, yakni setelah bintang-bintang itu terbenam maka bertasbih pulalah kamu. Atau lakukanlah salat Isya'ain yaitu Magrib dan Isya, pada pengertian yang pertama, dan pada pengertian yang kedua adalah salat fajar; menurut pendapat lain salat Subuh
